TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Twan nokan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 88 buwan, 286 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 262 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 24 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 85%, Amis 3%, Bunun 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Twan nokan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Twan nokan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Twan nokan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Twan nokan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'llaw na Twan nokan hya' ga Zihing. tay 'zil na Twan nokan hya' ga Saruc. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ twan nokan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na twan nokan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na twan nokan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na twan nokan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na twan nokan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔllaw na twan nokan ħjaʔ ɣa ziħiŋ. taj ʔzil na twan nokan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaruʦ~ʨ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Twan nokan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 88 buwan, 286 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 262 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 24 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 85%, Amis 3%, Bunun 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Twan nokan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Twan nokan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Twan nokan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Twan nokan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'llaw na Twan nokan hya' ga Zihing. tay 'zil na Twan nokan hya' ga Saruc. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ twan nokan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na twan nokan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na twan nokan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na twan nokan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na twan nokan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔllaw na twan nokan ħjaʔ ɣa ziħiŋ. taj ʔzil na twan nokan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaruʦ~ʨ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
